content.en:
Soon, Ye Tian finished browsing all the information, and his brows furrowed slightly.

He almost can't do the methods mentioned above, not to mention that he can't do it, and forces like the Garan Chamber of Commerce can't do it!

However, his eyes were fixed on one of the options, which seemed impossible, but was the only way he had hope.

"Great Realm Armor!"

This is a kind of super-dimensional secret technique, and it is also a high-grade talent super dimensional secret art, which comes from a powerful extra-dimensional biological race-the Tianjia clan.

The Tianjia clan is born with the ability to learn the Great Realm Armor Technique, and it is rumored that they have a special and special extra-dimensional talent-Tianjia talent, which is a unique talent of the Tianjia clan, not a conventional talent.

And although Ye Tian said that he fused all the conventional talents, he naturally didn't have this kind of strange talent. According to the information, if you practice the Great Realm Armor Technique and condense the first layer of Boundary Armor, you can make it impossible to deduce its traces from the extra-dimensional realm of the second realm, even if you use a super-dimensional Dao soldier of the medium tracking class, it will not be traceable.

If you have trained the second layer of boundary armor, even if it is the third realm, you will not be able to track and deduce, and you can ignore the super dimensional dao soldiers such as advanced tracking.

Once the third layer of the boundary armor is cultivated, the fourth realm will not be able to deduce its information.

And the Great Realm Armor Technique has a total of five realms.

It's just that if you want to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, it is too difficult, and the cultivation process is extremely dangerous, and the Tianjia clan has a very special secret liquid to offset its damage, but even if it is the Tianjia clan, it is extremely difficult to cultivate to the third layer, and only a very small number of clansmen can be supplied to cultivate to the third layer.

"The Great Realm Armor Technique, if I copy the Heavenly Armor talent, maybe I can practice it, as long as I cultivate to the third layer of the realm, it will be difficult for the fourth realm of the extra-dimensional realm to track and deduce my information, and it will be impossible to find my copy body, unless the other party has a higher-level super-dimensional Dao soldier, and it is a type of tracking and deduction, otherwise there is no way to help me. "

Ye Tian really wanted to know where there were extradimensional creatures of the Tianjia clan.

But this information does not have it.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked, "Nine Mu Realm Lord, how can I find the extradimensional creatures of the Heavenly Armor Clan and how can I obtain the Great Realm Armor Technique?"

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, if you want to cultivate the Great Realm Armor Technique, don't try it lightly, otherwise even if it is the existence of the Third Realm, you will have to cut off the potential foundation. The Nine Pastoral Realm Lord reminded.

"The Nine Pastoral Realm Lord can tell me!"

Ye Tian didn't want to explain, he couldn't say that he could try it casually.

Seeing that Ye Tian was very resolute, he didn't ask anymore, "This is another piece of information, worth 50 million Galanbao coins." We at the Garan Chamber of Commerce do not specialize in selling intelligence, but there is a price to pay for collecting this kind of information, which is the minimum cost. "

"No problem. "

Ye Tian happily paid 50 million Galanbao coins.

After that, the Nine Pastoral Realm Lord gave the information to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian finished reading it, he knew it in his heart.

The Tianjia clan is very powerful, they are not extradimensional creatures from the 6000 Territory and the nearby Extradimensional Territory, but from the Extradimensional Territory of the higher Extradimensional Territory.

Even the Garan Chamber of Commerce couldn't reach the headquarters of the Tianjia clan, it was too far away.

However, there are still many clansmen of the Tianjia clan who are left out of the outside world, such as some Tianjia clans in the territory of No. 500.

And in the territory of the 6,000th number, there is also a Tianjia clan.

"In the Liudu Boundary Mountain, there is a creature of the Tianjia family. "

And the Liudu Boundary Mountain is the most powerful force in the 6000 Territory, there is no one, but the Liudu Boundary Mountain is not a local force in the 6000 Territory, but a foreign force support, and the number of members is very small.

Liudu Boundary Mountain once captured a Tianjia clan and asked him to guard a peak in Liudu Boundary Mountain.

This is also the one that Ye Tian is most likely to come into contact with.

As for the Great Realm Armor Technique, the Tianjia Clan naturally knows it, but this is the Tianjia Clan's talent Super Dimensional Secret Technique, and it will definitely not be traded.

However, too many forces have studied the Great Realm Armor Technique, and naturally there are forces that have seized this Transcendent Secret Technique.

But the Six Thousand Territory undoubtedly does not have this kind of super dimensional secret technique, because there is no demand, who will buy this super dimensional secret technique!

Just when Ye Tian was disappointed, the Nine Mu Realm Lord smiled and said, "If the Ye Tian Realm Lord really wants this Great Realm Armor Technique, our Jialan Chamber of Commerce can buy a inheritance for you in the Five Thousand Territory." However, the price paid for traveling to and from the territory of the Five Thousand is not low, and you have to take the risk of buying the Great Realm Armor Technique, and you need to pay a certain price. "

"Tell me, how many Galanbao coins do you want?"

Ye Tian asked....

"100 Super Dimensional Dao Coins!" said the Nine Pasture Realm Lord.

"It's a little expensive, but I agreed!"

Not to mention 100 extra-dimensional Dao coins, even if it is 1,000 super-dimensional Dao coins, he is willing to pay.

"Okay, then the Ye Heavenly Realm Lord will first support the deposit of 10 extradimensional Dao coins, and wait for a superdimensional era of years!" the Nine Mu Realm Lord proposed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian immediately paid 10 Super Dimensional Dao Coins.

Of course. []

He didn't wait here, but prepared to meet the Tianjia clan, so as to copy the Tianjia clan's Tianjia talent.

Under normal circumstances, he would not be able to enter the territory of the Liudu Boundary Mountain, otherwise he would be attacked by the extradimensional realm powerhouse of the Liudu Boundary Mountain.

However, he can sneak in.

The strongest person in the Liudu Boundary Mountain is also in the second realm, and the third realm will not be sent to sit here.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not too worried.

Besides, he doesn't cause trouble, he copies the body of an extradimensional realm, sneaks in, and then comes out, and he will definitely not cause trouble.

......

Liudu Boundary Mountain.

Didu Peak.

Ye Tian copied the body of a Transcendent Realm of the Six Capital Realms, and then entered here without hindrance, but he couldn't stay here for too long, because that Transcendent Realm was still alive. 5.8

Soon, he approached a place where the Celestial Armor clan was guarding.

Rumble!!!!

A huge figure attracted Ye Tian's attention, the other party's body was extremely huge, and it held the entire Earth Capital Peak, and the aura was also extremely powerful, far surpassing Ye Tian.

"The Tianjia clan at the peak of the second realm, the Liudu Realm Mountain even dares to arrest such a powerful Tianjia clan, and the backing behind it is not small, otherwise they would not dare to make a move against the Tianjia clan. "

Ye Tian used the copying talent to perceive the other party's Tianjia talent, and with a thought in his heart, he copied this Tianjia talent.

After that, he quickly departed, and then dissolved the replica body without arousing any suspicion.

Soon after.

Ye Tian successfully fused the Heavenly Armor Talent, and this special extra-dimensional talent was in hand, and then he just waited for the Great Realm Armor Technique to arrive.
